name: Prism Straight Fly Helper
description: Practice-only straight-fly assistance designed to run alongside Prism Menu.

enabled.name: Enable Straight Fly Helper
enabled.description: Allows automatic detection and assistance while using ship mode in Practice Mode.

auto-detect.name: Auto Detect
auto-detect.description: Detects repeated ship taps with low vertical movement and activates assistance.

deadzone.name: Vertical Deadzone
deadzone.description: How far the ship may move away from the target line before assistance reacts.

velocity-strength.name: Velocity Correction
velocity-strength.description: How strongly vertical velocity affects automatic hold/release decisions.

detection-taps.name: Detection Taps
detection-taps.description: Number of quick alternating presses/releases needed before assistance activates.

detection-window.name: Detection Window
detection-window.description: Maximum seconds allowed for the required taps.

max-assist-seconds.name: Maximum Assist Time
max-assist-seconds.description: Stops assistance after this many seconds unless straight-fly input continues.

show-status.name: Show Status Label
show-status.description: Displays PRACTICE STRAIGHT FLY ASSIST while active.
